title: Multipart upload failed resolution (Objects)
summary: Resolve "multipart upload failed" — resolution for the Objects surface.

content.text:
## Symptom

An operation against the Objects surface fails with an error matching "multipart upload failed (resolution)".

## Resolution

1. Inspect the error envelope.
2. Re-issue with corrected parameters.
3. Confirm via the audit log.

See the [Objects API reference](/docs/api/buckets/get) for the exact field set.
